fields.title: Greek Salad
fields.description: Fresh romaine lettuce, ripe tomatoes, cucumber, olives, and creamy feta cheese drizzled with our house olive oil dressing.

fields.title: Bruschetta
fields.description: Toasted sourdough topped with marinated cherry tomatoes, fresh basil, and a drizzle of aged balsamic glaze.

fields.title: Hummus & Pita
fields.description: House-made chickpea hummus with paprika, olive oil, and warm toasted pita bread.

fields.title: Grilled Sea Bass
fields.description: Pan-seared Mediterranean sea bass with lemon herb butter, seasonal vegetables, and roasted potatoes.

fields.title: Lamb Kofta
fields.description: Spiced ground lamb skewers grilled over charcoal, served with tzatziki, warm flatbread, and tabbouleh.

fields.title: Chicken Shawarma
fields.description: Slow-roasted marinated chicken with garlic sauce, pickled vegetables, and fresh herbs in a grilled wrap.

fields.title: Vegetable Moussaka
fields.description: Layers of roasted aubergine, courgette, spiced tomato sauce, and creamy béchamel, baked golden.

fields.title: Lemon Dessert
fields.description: Our signature warm lemon tart with a buttery crust, tangy lemon curd, and a dusting of powdered sugar.

fields.title: Baklava
fields.description: Layers of crisp phyllo pastry filled with crushed pistachios and walnuts, soaked in rose water honey syrup.

fields.title: Chocolate Halva
fields.description: Rich sesame halva swirled with dark chocolate, served with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream.

fields.title: Fresh Lemonade
fields.description: Hand-squeezed lemonade with a hint of mint and a splash of sparkling water. Refreshing and zesty.

fields.title: Turkish Coffee
fields.description: Traditionally brewed strong coffee served in a copper cezve with a small piece of Turkish delight.

fields.title: House Red Wine
fields.description: A smooth Greek Agiorgitiko red, full-bodied with notes of cherry and spice. Pairs beautifully with mains.
